title: Variables and Secrets
excerpt: description: Variables and secrets are bound as follows: image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Variables and secrets are bound as follows: Text and data blobs can be loaded from files. File contents will be read and bound as `string`s and `ArrayBuffer`s respectively.
